name: Altera Infrastructure L.P. 7.25
summary: Altera Infrastructure L.P. (formerly Teekay Offshore Partners L.P.) owns and operates a fleet of shuttle tankers, floating production, storage and offloading (FPSO) units, and other infrastructure assets. The company focuses on providing services to the offshore oil and gas industry. Altera Infrastructure is headquartered in Westhill, Aberdeenshire, UK.
